title: CHemical RISk calculators (CHRIS) – Extraction Efficiency
author: Regulatory Catalog
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The extraction efficiency module of the CHemical RISk calculator (CHRIS) uses a non–steady state mass transport model to predict the extraction efficiency of bulk leachables from medical device polymers.
steps_raw: The extraction efficiency module of the CHemical RISk calculator (CHRIS) uses a non–steady state mass transport model to predict the extraction efficiency of bulk leachables from medical device polymers.
